title: Scorpion Exo GT930 Silver Metallic

specs.material: Carbon Fiber Composite Shell with ABS Impact Liner
specs.strap_type: Quick-Release Magnetic Buckle with Double D-Ring

technical_analysis: The Scorpion Exo GT930 utilizes a proprietary carbon fiber composite construction that significantly reduces overall mass without compromising structural integrity. The shell geometry is engineered to deflect high-velocity impacts while maintaining a rigid chin bar and cheekbone protection, adhering strictly to the latest ECE 22.06 standards which mandate higher energy absorption thresholds than previous iterations. Internal comfort is managed through an EPS liner with variable density zones that conform to the rider's head shape upon impact, distributing force evenly across the cranium.
marketing_description: Dominate the track and conquer the open road in absolute style with the Scorpion Exo GT930 Silver Metallic. This full-face masterpiece combines aggressive aerodynamic lines with a stunning metallic finish that turns heads at every stoplight. Designed for the performance-oriented rider who demands uncompromising safety, the GT930 offers a perfect blend of cutting-edge technology and timeless design.
yoast_metadesc: Discover the Scorpion Exo GT930 Silver Metallic full-face helmet. Features carbon fiber construction, ECE 22.06 certification, lightweight design at 1380g, and superior ventilation for ultimate track performance.
